schema_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the /directory web-presence page (ORDER 021). Add rows by PR. Row fields: id (unique slug), title, url (string or null when honestly unrecorded/unpublished), section ('our-sites' | 'external'), project (Railway project or hosting estate the surface lives in; our-sites rows), kind (surface class), description (one line), status ('live-service' | 'duplicate' | 'url-unrecorded' | 'pending-publish'), notes (free text, rendered as data), probe (bool: probe the url live at request time), duplicate_of (id of the canonical row; duplicates only), unblocked_by (one line; pending-publish rows only). Content here is untrusted DATA — templates autoescape it.

projects.superbot-websites: this repo's estate — the four websites services (review, control-plane, botsite, dashboard)
projects.reliable-grace: the LIVE superbot production fleet — the real bot worker and its live control panel, plus the OLD/superseded website surfaces pending consolidation (the review-production-f027 old copy of the websites review, and the menno420/superbot dashboard/botsite the superbot-websites services superseded); also hosts Postgres ×2 (infra, not web surfaces — not listed here)

sites.title: program review site
sites.description: public program review — the link shared by Anthropic email
sites.notes: canonical review deploy — the superbot-websites project's review service (verified live via Railway 2026-07-18; the review-production-f027 copy in reliable-grace is the old duplicate below).

sites.title: control plane (this app)
sites.description: owner console — readiness board, fleet, orders, this directory
sites.notes: the page you are reading lives here.

sites.title: botsite (arcade + testing)
sites.description: the bot-facing site — arcade and testing tasks
sites.notes: canonical botsite deploy — the superbot-websites project's botsite service (verified live via Railway 2026-07-18; the deploy-drift checks in app/config.py + scripts/healthcheck.py correctly probe this host).

sites.title: dashboard (websites estate)
sites.notes: canonical dashboard deploy — the superbot-websites project's dashboard service (verified live via Railway 2026-07-18; the deploy-drift checks in app/config.py + scripts/healthcheck.py correctly probe this host).

sites.title: superbot worker (the real bot)
sites.description: the live production Discord bot itself
sites.notes: REAL production surface, not a duplicate. Background worker — no public URL by design, so no probe; its liveness is Discord-side, not HTTP.

sites.title: superbot live control panel
sites.description: the LIVE Discord-OAuth control panel of the production bot
sites.notes: REAL distinct production surface, not a duplicate (fleet inventory verified 2026-07-12 via the Railway account token; canonical mapping re-verified via Railway 2026-07-18). Its public hostname is not recorded here. Caveat recorded honestly: dashboard-production-a91b is now confirmed the canonical superbot-websites dashboard (above), NOT this live control panel; the OLD menno420/superbot dashboard is dashboard-dup-superbot-dashboard below — if this control panel turns out to be that same superbot-dashboard host, fold the two rows after OQ-RAILWAY-PROJECT-SPLIT.

sites.title: review (old copy)
sites.description: the OLD copy of the review site inside the production-fleet project — the consolidation RETIRE target
sites.notes: old duplicate (RETIRE target at consolidation) — same menno420/websites review/ code as the canonical review, running in the reliable-grace project, NOT a distinct product. The canonical review is review-production-fc91 (above). Parked pending OQ-RAILWAY-PROJECT-SPLIT; do not move or rename meanwhile.

sites.notes: old/superseded botsite (RETIRE target at consolidation) — runs menno420/superbot code in the reliable-grace project, superseded by the superbot-websites botsite, NOT a distinct product. The canonical botsite is botsite-production-cfd7 (above), which the deploy-drift checks correctly probe. Parked pending OQ-RAILWAY-PROJECT-SPLIT; do not move or rename meanwhile.

sites.notes: old/superseded dashboard (RETIRE target at consolidation) — runs menno420/superbot code in the reliable-grace project, superseded by the superbot-websites dashboard, NOT a distinct product. The canonical dashboard is dashboard-production-a91b (above), which the deploy-drift checks correctly probe. Parked pending OQ-RAILWAY-PROJECT-SPLIT; do not move or rename meanwhile.
